sentences.text: He said, 'My boy fell and hurt himself, and I need the Doctor.'
The Doctor lives far, and the night is bad, so you should go.
You know I will give you my wheelbarrow, so you should do something for me.
'Certainly,' said little Hans, 'I am happy you came to me, and I will go now.
